text.en:
If your Army Faction is **NECRONS**, at the end of your Command phase, each friendly unit with this ability that is on the battlefield activates its Reanimation Protocols:
▪ When a unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, that unit **heals** D3 wounds.

***Example**: A unit of Lokhust Destroyers (which have a Wounds characteristic of 3) activates its Reanimation Protocols. The unit had a Starting Strength of 3, but currently contains 2 models, and one of those models has lost 1 wound. A 3 is rolled to see how many wounds are reanimated. The first of these reanimated wounds restores the wounded Lokhust Destroyer back to 3 wounds. The second of these reanimated wounds returns the destroyed Lokhust Destroyer to the battlefield with 1 wound remaining. The third of these reanimated wounds restores one of the remaining lost wounds to the same Lokhust Destroyer that was just returned. The unit now contains 3 models, two of which have 3 wounds remaining and one of which has 2 wounds remaining.*

■ Ranged weapons equipped by **CRYPTEK** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.
■ In your Shooting phase, each time a **CRYPTEK** unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: **[ANTI‑INFANTRY 3+]**, **[ANTI‑MOUNTED 4+]**, **[ASSAULT]**, **[HEAVY]**, **[IGNORES COVER]**. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability.

Each time a **NECRONS** model (excluding **MONSTER** models) from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, ranged weapons equipped by **NECRONS VEHICLE** and **NECRONS MOUNTED** models (excluding **TITANIC** models) from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.
Friendly Necrons Titanic Fly units have +6" M. This detachment has the HYPERCRYPT tag and cannot be taken with another HYPERCRYPT detachment.
text.de: Befreundete fliegende titanische Necron-Einheiten haben +6" B. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Hypergruft und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Hyper­gruft gewählt werden.
text.es: Las unidades Volar Titánica Necrones amigas tienen +6" a M. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta HIPERCRIPTA y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento HIPERCRIPTA.
text.fr: Les unités Titanesques Nécrons amies qui ont le mot-clé Vol ont +6" en M. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Hypercrypte et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement d’Hypercrypte.
text.it: Le unità Titaniche con Volare dei Necron amiche hanno +6" M. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Ipercripta e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Ipercripta.
text.ja: 味方ネクロン・巨大兵器・飛行・ユニットの【移】は+6mvの修正を受ける。 このデタッチメントは超高次墓所タグを持ち、他の超高次墓所タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 네크론 거대 비행 유닛에 이동 +6"를 적용합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 초공간 태그가 부여되며 다른 초공간 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 己方太空死灵巨型飞行单位拥有 M +6"。 本分遣队拥有超墓穴标签，并且不能与另一个拥有超墓穴标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
■ Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by **DESTROYER CULT** models from your army.
■ The first time each turn that a **DESTROYER CULT** unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half‑strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly **NECRONS** models (excluding **DESTROYER CULT**, **MONSTER** and **TITANIC** models).

Each time a **DESTROYER CULT** or **FLAYED ONES** unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Charge roll as well.

Each time a **DESTROYER CULT** unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

At the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of **NECRONS** units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:

■ **Incursion**: Up to 1 unit
■ **Strike Force**: Up to 2 units
■ **Onslaught**: Up to 3 units

Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

• Friendly IMMORTALS/NECRON WARRIORS units’ ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].
  • When a friendly IMMORTALS/NECRON WARRIORS unit is selected to make an advance move, that move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.
This detachment has the DYNASTY tag and cannot be taken with another DYNASTY detachment.
text.de:
• Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Unsterbliche-/Necronkrieger-Einheiten haben [Sturm].
  • Wenn eine befreundete Unsterbliche-/Necronkrieger-Einheit eine Vorrückenbewegung ausführt, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass jene Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Dynastie und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Dynastie gewählt werden.
text.es:
• Los ataques a distancia de las unidades INMORTALES/GUERREROS NECRONES amigas tienen [ASALTO].
  • Cuando una unidad INMORTALES/GUERREROS NECRONES amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar, esto no le impide ser apta para iniciar acciones.
Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta DINASTÍA y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento DINASTÍA.
text.fr:
• Les attaques de tir des unités d'Immortels/Guerriers Nécrons amies ont [ASSAUT].
  • Quand une unité d'Immortels/Guerriers Nécrons amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d'avance, ce dernier ne l'empêche pas d'être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
Ce détachement a l'étiquette Dynastie et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Dynastie.
text.it:
• Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità di Immortali/Necron Guerrieri amiche hanno [Assalto].
  • Quando un’unità di Immortali/Necron Guerrieri amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata, tale movimento non impedisce a quell’unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Dinastia e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Dinastia.
text.ja:
• 味方イモータル/ネクロン・ウォリアー・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
  • 味方イモータル/ネクロン・ウォリアー・ユニットが全力移動を行った場合でも、そのユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
このデタッチメントは王朝タグを持ち、他の王朝タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
• 아군 불멸대/네크론 전사 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]이 부여됩니다.
  • 아군 불멸대/네크론 전사 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 특수 행동 시작이 가능합니다.
이 디태치먼트에 왕조 태그가 부여되며 다른 왕조 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方不朽者/太空死灵武士单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。
  • 当一个己方不朽者/太空死灵武士单位被选择进行一次突击移动，那次移动不会阻止那个单位开始一次行动。
本分遣队拥有王朝标签，并且不能与另一个拥有王朝标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
**NECRONS MONSTER** units from your army have the following ability:

**Distortion Fields (Aura):** While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

At the start of each phase, for each **NECRONS MONSTER** unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9".

**Designer’s Note:** *If your army contains more than one* **TRANSCENDENT C’TAN** *unit, each of those units must take the Reletavistic Tether ability.*

*This eldritch device fetters and directs the Deceiver’s powers within a vortex that devours lesser wits entirely.*

**C’TAN SHARD OF THE DECEIVER** model only. This model has the following ability:

**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

*The energies of this binding latch onto enemy targets and shunt the shard into alignment with them.*

**C’TAN SHARD OF THE NIGHTBRINGER** model only. This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

*This device bleeds off the Void Dragon shard’s energies and earths them violently through nearby machines.*

**C’TAN SHARD OF THE VOID DRAGON** model only. Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy **VEHICLE** unit visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that Leadership test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

*This binding uses atomic resonance magnetism to compel the shard into the midst of the foe.*

**TRANSCENDENT C’TAN** model only. In your turn, when this unit makes an **ingress/advance** move using its Transdimensional Displacement ability, this unit can end that move more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units (instead of more than 8"). When this unit ends that move within 8" of an enemy unit, this unit is not **eligible to declare a charge** until the end of the turn.

• Friendly TOMB BLADES units have Deep Strike.
  • When a friendly TOMB BLADES unit is selected to shoot, if that unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit’s ranged attacks have +1 to hit rolls.
text.de:
• Befreundete Gruftklingen-Einheiten haben Schocktruppen.
  • Wenn eine befreundete Gruftklingen-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird und jene Einheit in diesem Zug eine Einsatz­bewegung ausgeführt hat, haben die Fernkampfattacken jener Einheit +1 auf Trefferwürfe.
text.es:
• Las unidades CUCHILLAS DE LA NECRÓPOLIS amigas tienen Despliegue rápido.
  • Cuando una unidad CUCHILLAS DE LA NECRÓPOLIS amiga se elija para disparar, si esa unidad hizo un movimiento de inserción en este turno, los ataques a distancia de esa unidad tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Mécanoptères amies ont Frappe en Profondeur.
  • Quand une unité de Mécanoptères amie est choisie pour tirer, si elle a fait un mouvement d'arrivée à ce tour, ses attaques de tir ont +1 aux jets de touche.
text.it:
• Le unità di Lame Tombali amiche hanno Attacco in Profondità.
  • Quando un’unità di Lame Tombali amica viene scelta per tirare, se quell’unità ha effettuato un movimento di inserzione in questo turno i suoi attacchi da tiro hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
text.ja:
• 味方トゥームブレイド・ユニットは『縦深攻撃』を持つ。
  • 味方トゥームブレイド・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時、そのユニットがこのターン中に突入移動を行っていたならば、そのユニットの射撃攻撃はヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 아군 무덤칼 유닛에 심층 타격을 부여합니다.
  • 아군 무덤칼 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 이번 턴에 그 유닛이 진입 이동을 수행했다면, 그 유닛의 원거리 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方墓穴之刃单位拥有 深入打击。
  • 当一个己方墓穴之刃单位被选择进行射击，如果那个单位在该回合进行了入场移动，那个单位的远程攻击拥有 +1 命中掷骰。

text.en: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a **NOBLE**, **LYCHGUARD** or **TRIARCH** unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Power Matrix, as follows:

■ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Power Matrix.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Power Matrix.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Power Matrix.

Each time a model in a **CRYPTEK** or **CANOPTEK** unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
While a **NECRONS CHARACTER** model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

If your unit has the **CRYPTEK** keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Through some quirk of their kind’s shared insanity, a spark of gruesome satisfaction surges through them with every enemy life snuffed out, triggering quiescent power reserves that drive them onwards.

fluff.en: It is not only android soldiery that be compelled to serve. With a command, prized war engines and ornate weapons are empowered to hyperlethality.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: A tomb world’s war engines are the pride of its nobility and they will suffer no affront to them, demanding the reassembly of slablike armour atom by atom even as the foe seek to sunder the vehicles.

target.en: One **LYCHGUARD** or **TRIARCH** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

fluff.en: Few enemy are worthy of a duel. What dangerous vermin are encountered are prioritised for execution to safeguard the nobles’ honour.

target.en: One **CRYPTEK** model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly **CANOPTEK** model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Vindictive Crypteks often hardwire vengeance subprotocols into the ancient cores of their unliving servants, by which a last act of reprisal is assured.

fluff.en: Necrons strike with data-augmented accuracy.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

fluff.en: The legions employ the strategies of their masters in perfect synchronicity, laying down hails of mechanically coordinated fire.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The Necrons are driven to reclaim what is theirs, exterminating all who would impede such efforts without mercy.

target.en: One **NECRONS VEHICLE** or **NECRONS MOUNTED** unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Wrought from living metal and further protected by the arcane technologies of Crypteks, the forms of Necron vehicles and steeds are almost impervious to conventional weapons.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by **CRYPTEK** or **CANOPTEK** models in your unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

fluff.en: Only the foolish tread where a Cryptek has set their sights, for these arcane scientists will suffer no threat to their works.

target.en: That **NECRONS MONSTER** model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after a **NECRONS MONSTER** model from your army is destroyed, before making its Deadly Demise roll.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

fluff.en: Tear one shard suddenly from the complex web of atomic resonances and its severing triggers a violent energistic dissonance blast.

target.en: One friendly **NECRONS** unit (excluding **MONSTERS**) within 6" of that Monster unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a **NECRONS MONSTER** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

fluff.en: The power of the C’tan rips the foe’s greatest assets apart and forcibly reknits nearby Necron soldiery using the stolen corporeal matter.

target.en: Your **NECRONS WARLORD**.

when.en: Any phase, just after your opponent’s **WARLORD** is destroyed.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

fluff.en: With a pulse of necroneural energy that erodes the foe’s will, the Necron commander declares the fall of the enemy general, promising their remaining forces that it is only a matter of time until they join their master in ignoble death.

target.en: One **LYCHGUARD** or **TRIARCH PRAETORIANS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Lychguard never tire, nor give a thought to their own safety over that of their master. With parrying blows and blocking shots they protect their liege even as they continue to strike down their opponents.

target.en: One **NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER** model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: At the end of the phase, set up the **destroyed** model on the battlefield, **unengaged** and as close as possible to where it was **destroyed**. That model is not part of an **attached** unit and its unit has a **starting strength** of 1. That model has half of its starting number of wounds remaining.

restrictions.en: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: Necron rulers possess enhanced self-repair systems.

target.en: One **CRYPTEK** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one friendly **NECRONS** model (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within 12" of a **CRYPTEK** model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly **NECRONS** model has the **CRYPTEK** keyword.

fluff.en: Quantum reservoirs of potent energies held within this Cryptek’s warrior jewellery release a fragment of their charge to augment nearby Necron forces.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers.

when.en: Your opponent’s Command phase.

effect.en: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a **CRYPTEK** unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound.

fluff.en: Drawing upon the accumulated precausal potential energies that coalesce around significant locations, the conclave are able to steal that power and use it to trigger the unrealized probable remanifestation matrices of their own forces.

target.en: One **NECRONS VEHICLE** or **NECRONS MOUNTED** unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: The time‑bending technologies in the nobility’s powerful vehicles allow them to traverse the battlefield in stuttering bursts of hypervelocity.

target.en: One **NECRONS VEHICLE** or **NECRONS MOUNTED** unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.

fluff.en: Using phase‑shifting technology, Necron war engines can slip into alternate dimensions, leaving only ghostly traces as they move through solid matter.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit (excluding **MONSTER** and **TITANIC** units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.

when.en: End of your Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

fluff.en: Should the unclean thralls of lesser species threaten dynastic territories, the fallen Necron soldiery will rise to repel the interlopers.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army (excluding **MONSTER** and **TITANIC** units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Subroutines buried deep within the neural networks of Necron soldiers and crews enable them to react instantaneously to targeting locks, repositioning themselves to evade incoming fire or close in upon the foe.

target.en: One friendly **NECRONS** unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within 9" of that **DESTROYER CULT** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a **DESTROYER CULT** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.

effect.en: The friendly unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

fluff.en: In the absolute destruction of their enemies, the corrupted Necrons find fresh purpose and a macabre simulacrum of new life.

target.en: One **DESTROYER CULT** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

fluff.en: The murderous goad of the Destroyer madness pushes these android killers to seemingly impossible efforts to get to grips with the foe.

target.en: That **DESTROYER CULT**/**FLAYED ONES** unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly **unengaged DESTROYER CULT**/**FLAYED ONES** unit this phase has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: To strike down one horror is merely to draw the rest of the pack’s insane and murderous focus.

target.en: One **DESTROYER CULT** or **FLAYED ONES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Wreathed in tendrils of transdimensional shadow that intensify their deathly visages, these killing machines evoke such terror that steady aims tremble and blade arms are sapped of strength.

target.en: Your **NECRONS WARLORD**.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: For each of your **NECRONS** units in Reserves, that Reserves unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

fluff.en: There is no rest for Necrons who fall in the service of their master. In dark crypts, their bodies are repaired and they are dispatched once more to war.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army (excluding **MONSTER** units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

restrictions.en: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

fluff.en: With a sanity-defying mechanism at the heart of the tomb, dynastic astromancers divine the pre-aligned point in space and time where a crucial role can be played in the wider battle plan.

target.en: One **NECRONS MONSTER** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result. If that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: Those without the will to hold themselves together start to physically tatter apart in a molecular haze in the presence of so many god shards.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.

effect.en: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

fluff.en: The very stuff of reality flows together at an atomic level, and the foe find to their horror that they are literally – and gruesomely – rooted to the spot.

target.en: One **LYCHGUARD** or **TRIARCH** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the **VEHICLE** keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.

fluff.en: The ancient and arrogant will of the nobility drives their powerful servants to stand their ground defiantly as they claim the dynasty’s rightful lands.

target.en: One **CRYPTEK** model from your army.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one objective marker within 18" of your **CRYPTEK** model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly **NECRONS** models have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.

fluff.en: By remotely accessing a hidden engine’s most illuminating protocols, a Cryptek can release the awesome power of a caged solar flare.

target.en: One **CANOPTEK** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Canoptek constructs spent the long Great Sleep in watchful vigilance. Triggering a surge of power, they are capable of responsive manoeuvres to outwit the swiftest of attackers.

target.en: One **CANOPTEK** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: With a twist to the fabric of time, a bubble of another moment enshrouds these constructs. Strange emissions from long-dead elder stars or utter darkness from a nighttime far in the future occludes them from their master’s foes.

target.en: One **CANOPTEK** unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

effect.en: Your unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

fluff.en: Canoptek constructs use sophisticated metalogic to craft sinister ambushes. Luring the foe in by appearing at suboptimal operation, a surge of reanimation protocols suddenly swells their numbers.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.

effect.en: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a **NECRONS CHARACTER** is leading your unit).

fluff.en: Nanoscarabs are released in boiling black clouds that whirl about the legions and effect rapid repairs.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability. In addition, if a **NECRONS CHARACTER** is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.

fluff.en: Arcing energies leap from one Necron to the next, lending them unnatural speed and surety.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase

when.en: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: The android soldiery of the cursed legion are maddened with the desire to engage and slay their victims at close quarters.

target.en: One **NECRONS INFANTRY** unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly **MONOLITH** model.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.

effect.en: Remove your **INFANTRY** unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your **MONOLITH** model and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Obeying recall protocols, threatened tomb defenders will phase out of existence, only to be relocated to a more advantageous position by the tomb’s hulking Monoliths.

target.en: One **NECRONS** unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternity Gate ability of a **MONOLITH** model that started the turn on the battlefield.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.

fluff.en: As the tomb’s warriors pass through a dimensional displacement corridor, the passage’s surface is lit with data-glyphs providing hyperlogical tactical information. When they step from an eternity gate, they are already prepared for the hunt.

target.en: One **NECRONS CHARACTER** unit from your army that was within 6" of that **NECRONS** unit when it was destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a **NECRONS** unit from your army.

effect.en: After the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: Criss-cross fire leaps from the Necron ranks, forming a blazing corona of deadly energy to punish those who dare threaten the indignant nobility’s legions.

target.en: One **CRYPTEK INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: If your unit has the **NECRON WARRIORS** keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit has the **IMMORTALS** keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: This thrumming cloud of minute nanoscarabs whirls around the Necrons, affecting instantaneous repairs

target.en: One **CRYPTEK** model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly **NECRONS** model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: A portion of the Cryptek’s animus clings to the battlefield just long enough to possess their servants and use them to exact revenge.

target.en: One **NECRONS VEHICLE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Necron quantum shielding is a true marvel of techno-arcana. Channelled with energy reserves from the rising tomb structures, the shielding is capable of adaptive remodulation to diffuse and deflect the most powerful enemy attacks.

target.en: One **TITANIC** model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.

fluff.en: Towering war engines rise from an erupting tomb in its defence, directing entropic energies to weaken and fracture the enemies’ own weapons and turning them into dangerous tools only the desperate would use.

target.en: That <k>Obelisk/Tesseract Vault</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>オベリスク/テッセラクト・ヴォールト</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>方尖碑/超立方迷宫</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Obelisk/Tesseract Vault unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Obelisk-/Tesserakt-Verlies-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Obelisco/Cripta Teseráctica amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Obélisque/Crypte Tesseract amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Obelisco/Cripta Tesseratica amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方オベリスク/テッセラクト・ヴォールト・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 방첨탑/테서랙트 묘실 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方方尖碑/超立方迷宫单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s Tesla Sphere weapons have +1 AP.
effect.es: Las armas Esfera tesla de tu unidad tienen +1 a FP.
effect.fr: Les Sphères Tesla de votre unité ont +1 en PA.
effect.it: Le armi sfera tesla della tua unità hanno +1 VP.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの「テスラスフィア」武器の【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 테슬라 구체 무기에 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的特斯拉球武器拥有 +1 AP。

fluff.en: Transdimensional conduits harvest esoteric energy from coronal stellar scoops, beaming its coruscating fury into capacitor channels within this war engine, thence into the enemy lines in vivid arcs.
fluff.de: Transdimensionale Leiter ziehen esoterische Energien aus dem Herzen von Sternen und leiten deren knisternde Wut in Kondensatorkanäle innerhalb dieser Kriegsmaschine, um sie in grellen Blitzen gegen den Feind zu entfesseln.
fluff.es: Los conductos transdimensionales extraen energía esotérica de las estelas coronales, irradiando su furia centelleante hacia los condensadores de esta máquina, y de ahí hacia las líneas enemigas en letales arcos.
fluff.fr: Les conduits transdimensionnels récoltent l’énergie ésotérique des corolles stellaires, qu’ils acheminent jusqu’aux accumulateurs de cette machine de guerre, qui la projette sur l’ennemi sous forme de décharges aveuglantes.
fluff.it: Condotti transdimensionali risucchiano energia da accumulatori di materia coronale e ne incanalano i furenti bagliori nei condensatori di questa macchina da guerra, che li riversa poi tra le linee nemiche.
fluff.ja: 超次元導路が恒星の外冠より神秘の力を汲み上げ、その煌めく激流を戦闘兵器の蓄積回路へ注入する。蓄えられた力は鮮烈な電光となって敵の戦列を撃つ。
fluff.ko: 항성 국자로 수확된 기묘한 에너지가 횡차원 도관을 통해 이동한 다음, 이 전쟁 병기의 저장 경로로 번쩍이며 조사된다. 이렇게 모인 에너지는 곧 휘황찬란한 섬락의 형태로 적진에 날아든다.
fluff.zh: 198跨维导管从冠状星勺中汲取奥秘能量，将其那耀眼夺目的狂暴威能射入这台战争机器内部的电容通道，继而化作绚烂的弧光，直击敌阵。

target.en: That <k>Necrons Titanic Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité <k>Titanesque Nécron</k> qui a le mot-clé <k>Vol</k>.
target.ja: その<k>ネクロン・巨大兵器・飛行</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>太空死灵巨型飞行</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Necrons Titanic Fly</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>fliegende titanische Necron</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo de tu oponente o la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Volar Titánica Necrones</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité <k>Titanesque Nécron</k> amie qui a le mot-clé <k>Vol</k>.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità <k>Titanica</k> dei <k>Necron</k> con <k>Volare</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ネクロン・巨大兵器・飛行</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>네크론 거대 비행</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中或在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个己方<k>太空死灵巨型飞行</k>单位进行攻击时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit have ‑1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 a FP hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité ont ‑1 en PA jusqu’à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격 수행을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到那个敌方单位完成攻击前，针对您的单位进行的攻击的 AP -1。

fluff.en: The layers of this war machine’s armour are interspersed with molecule‑thin webs of additional quantum shielding to absorb and localise impacts.
fluff.de: Die Schichten der Panzerung dieser Kriegsmaschine sind mit molekularen Netzen aus zusätzlichen Quantenschilden durchwirkt, die Einschläge absorbieren und örtlich begrenzen.
fluff.es: Las capas de la armadura de esta máquina de guerra se intercalan con redes de escudos cuánticos adicionales, finísimas como moléculas, para absorber y localizar los impactos.
fluff.fr: Les couches de blindage de cette machine sont entrecoupées de mailles de blindage quantique pour absorber et contenir les impacts.
fluff.it: Le piastre di questa macchina da guerra sono intervallate da reti molecolari di protezioni quantum addizionali per assorbire e localizzare gli impatti.
fluff.ja: この戦闘兵器は、装甲内部の各層に分子レベルの薄さであるクォンタムシールドが施されており、着弾の衝撃を吸収して抑えることができる。
fluff.ko: 이 전쟁 기계의 장갑층 사이에는 분자 두깨의 양자 차폐막 그물이 여럿 삽입되어 있어, 타격을 흡수하고 국소화한다.
fluff.zh: 这台战争机器的装甲层间交织着分子级的额外量子护盾网，旨在吸收并局限冲击。

target.en: One friendly <k>Necrons Titanic Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité <k>Titanesque Nécron</k> amie qui a le mot-clé  <k>Vol</k>.
target.ja: 味方<k>ネクロン・巨大兵器・飛行</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>太空死灵巨型飞行</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +3" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit hat +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y a 12" o menos de ella, esa unidad tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité : l’unité choisie a +3" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 아군 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +3"。

fluff.en: From the war machine’s pinnacle rolls an expanding wave of invisible particles that paints the foe in sharp relief upon Necron targeting systems.
fluff.de: Von der Spitze dieser Kriegsmaschine strömt eine Welle unsichtbarer Partikel aus, die den Feind für die Zielsysteme der Necrons in scharfen Umrissen zeichnen.
fluff.es: Desde la cima de la máquina de guerra se extiende una ola expansiva de partículas invisibles que destaca al enemigo con un nítido relieve en los sistemas de puntería de los Necrones.
fluff.fr: Du sommet de la machine de guerre s’étend une onde de particules invisibles qui accentue la définition de l’ennemi sur les systèmes de ciblage nécrons.
fluff.it: Dalla sommità della macchina da guerra si propaga un’onda di particelle invisibili che evidenziano i nemici ai sistemi di puntamento dei Necron.
fluff.ja: 戦闘兵器の最上部から不可視の粒子波が放出され、ネクロンの捕捉システムに敵を鮮明に映し出す。
fluff.ko: 이 전쟁 기계의 꼭대기에서는 가시영역 밖의 입자가 파동처럼 퍼져나간다. 이윽고 네크론 표적 추적 체계에 적의 모습이 선명한 부조처럼 솟아오른다.
fluff.zh: 无形的粒子波从这个战争机器的顶端扩散，在太空死灵的瞄准系统中将敌人点亮。

target.en: That <k>Immortals/Necron Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>イモータル/ネクロン・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>不朽者/太空死灵武士</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly <k>Immortals/Necron Warriors</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete <k>Unsterbliche</k>-<k>/Necronkrieger</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que haya tomado como blanco una unidad <k>Inmortales/Guerreros Necrones</k> haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité d’<k>Immortels/Guerriers Nécrons</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che ha scelto come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Immortali/Necron Guerrieri</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>イモータル/ネクロン・ウォリアー</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>불멸대/네크론 전사</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位针对一个己方<k>不朽者/太空死灵武士</k>单位进行了射击后。

effect.en: Your unit shoots using snap shooting, but while doing so your unit can only target that enemy unit.
effect.de: Deine Einheit führt eiligen Beschuss aus, kann aber dabei nur jene feindliche Einheit als Ziel wählen.
effect.es: Tu unidad dispara mediante disparos repentinos, pero solo puede tomar como blanco esa unidad enemiga.
effect.fr: Votre unité tire en utilisant le tir au jugé, mais ce faisant, elle peut seulement cibler cette unité ennemie.
effect.it: La tua unità tira usando tiro improvviso, ma mentre lo fa può avere come bersaglio solo quell’unità nemica.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは即応射撃で射撃する。ただしその自軍ユニットの射撃は、その敵ユニットのみを攻撃対象として選択できる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 스냅 샷을 사용해 사격을 수행합니다. 단, 이때 이 유닛은 그 적 유닛만 대상으로 지정할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位使用快速射击进行射击，但在这样做时，您的单位只能以那个敌方单位作为目标。

fluff.en: In response to enemy threats, these Necron footsoldiers unseal canoptek urns and unleash a localised nanoscarab plague to saturate the site they are holding.
fluff.de: Als Reaktion auf feindliche Bedrohungen brechen diese Fußsoldaten der Necrons die Siegel von Kanoptech-Urnen und entfesseln eine lokalisierte Nanoskarabäenplage, um die von ihnen gesicherte Schlüsselposition zu halten.
fluff.es: En respuesta a las amenazas enemigas, estos soldados Necrones de infantería abren urnas canópticas y desatan una plaga localizada de nanoescarabajos que satura el lugar que controlan.
fluff.fr: En réponse aux menaces ennemies, ces fantassins nécrons descellent des urnes canopteks et libèrent une nuée de nanoscarabées localisée pour saturer le site qu’ils occupent.
fluff.it: In risposta alle minacce nemiche, questi fanti necron aprono urne canoptek e scatenano un’infestazione localizzata di nanoscarabei per saturare il sito che proteggono.
fluff.ja: 敵の脅威に反応すべく、このネクロン歩兵たちはカノプテックの壺を開放し、局所的にナノスカラベを蔓延させて防護地域を溢れさせてしまう。
fluff.ko: 적의 위협에 마주친 이 네크론 보병들은 카놉텍 단지의 봉인을 열었다. 이제 국소적인 나노갑충 역병이 전장을 가득 매웠다.
fluff.zh: 为了应对敌军的威胁，这些太空死灵士兵将冥工虫瓮打开，释放出地区性的纳米虫群，在防守区域中散布。

target.en: One friendly <k>Immortals</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方<k>イモータル</k>・ユニット1個。

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Your unit has +1 OC until the end of the turn.
effect.de: Bis zum Ende des Zugs hat deine Einheit +1 MK.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene +1 a CO hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr: Votre unité a +1 en CO jusqu’à la fin du tour.
effect.it: La tua unità ha +1 CO fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja: そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは<k>【確】</k>に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 장악 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到回合结束前，您的单位的 OC +1。

fluff.en: Simple and inescapable directives compel these Immortals to seize strategically vital battlefield sites and fight with redoubled fury to defend them from the foe.
fluff.de: Einfache und unausweichliche Direktiven bewegen diese Unsterblichen dazu, strategisch wichtige Schlachtfeldpositionen einzunehmen und mit aller Macht gegen den Feind zu verteidigen.
fluff.es: Unas instrucciones sencillas e ineludibles obligan a estos Inmortales a apoderarse de posiciones vitales en el campo de batalla y a luchar con furia redoblada para defenderlas.
fluff.fr: Des directives simples et inéluctables obligent ces Immortels à s’emparer de sites stratégiques et redoubler d’efforts pour les défendre.
fluff.it: Direttive semplici e inconfutabili spingono questi Immortali a conquistare posizioni chiave sul campo di battaglia e a combattere con maggiore furia per difenderle dai nemici.
fluff.ja: このイモータルたちは、簡素にして逃れ得ぬ命令が下されたことで戦略的に重要な地点を奪取し、敵の手から守るべく更なる怒りを抱き戦うことを強制される。
fluff.ko: 간명하고 필연적인 명령이 불멸대에게 내려졌다. 전략적 요충지를 확보한 다음 한층 더 맹렬하게 싸워 적으로부터 지켜내라는 분부다.
fluff.zh: 简易但无法解除的指令驱使这些不朽者前去占领战场上的战略要地，并且会更加奋力地防卫这个位置。

target.en: One friendly <k>Immortals/Necron Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方<k>イモータル/ネクロン・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>不朽者/太空死灵武士</k>单位。

when.en: End of your Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个您的单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: Moved like playing pieces by the irresistible will of their noble masters, the Necron soldiery rapidly secured ever more dynastic territory.
fluff.de: Diese Necrontruppen werden vom unwiderstehlichen Willen ihrer adligen Meister wie Spielsteine über das Feld bewegt und sichern schnell immer mehr Territorien für die Dynastie.
fluff.es: Impulsados ​​como piezas de juego por la irresistible voluntad de sus nobles señores, la soldadesca necrona se apodera rápidamente de más territorios dinásticos.
fluff.fr: Déplacés comme des pièces de jeu par la volonté irrésistible de leurs maîtres nobles, les soldats nécrons sécurisent rapidement davantage de territoire dynastique.
fluff.it: Mossi come pedoni dai nobili padroni, i soldati necron conquistano sempre più territorio dinastico.
fluff.ja: ネクロンの兵士たちは、高貴なる主の断固たる意志の駒として動き、王朝の領土を急速に拡大していった。
fluff.ko: 지체 높은 주인의 거역 못할 의지에 의해 장기말처럼 달린 네크론 군세는 왕조의 강역을 날로 더 넓혔다.
fluff.zh: 在贵族领主的驱使下，太空死灵的士兵像是棋子一样听命行动，快速占领王朝的领地。

target.en: That <k>Necrons Mounted</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ネクロン・騎乗</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>太空死灵骑乘</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Necrons Mounted unit is selected to make a fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete berittene Necron-­Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Montada Necrones amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Nécrons Montée amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità In Sella dei Necron amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ネクロン・騎乗・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 네크론 기승 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方太空死灵骑乘单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Once their targeting imperatives are locked in place, these hurtling Necron killers keep hammering their targets with fire even as they spiral and swoop back and forth across the enemy lines.
fluff.de: Wenn ihre Zielimperative erst aktiv sind, feuern diese hochmobilen Necronkiller unentwegt auf ihre Feinde, selbst während sie kreuz und quer über deren Linien umhersausen.
fluff.es: Una vez sus imperativos de puntería están fijados, estos veloces asesinos Necrones martillean a sus objetivos con disparos mientras se lanzan en espiral y se abalanzan sobre las líneas enemigas.
fluff.fr: Une fois leurs impératifs de ciblage verrouillés, ces tueurs nécrons véloces continuent de marteler leurs cibles sous les tirs alors même qu’ils virevoltent d’arrière en avant à travers la ligne adverse.
fluff.it: Una volta attivati gli imperativi di puntamento, questi assassini necron lanciati in corsa continuano a martellare i bersagli anche mentre si muovono rapidamente tra le linee nemiche.
fluff.ja: 標的の固定が完了すると、この俊敏なネクロンの殺戮者たちは敵戦線を縦横無尽に蹂躙し、後退しながらでさえ射撃を行い続ける。
fluff.ko: 명에 따라 목표가 획득 및 고정되고 나면, 전장을 질주하는 이 네크론 살인자들은 적 전선을 넘나들며 나선 기동과 급강하를 수행하는 도중에조차 대상에게 쉼없이 사격을 퍼붓는다.
fluff.zh: 一旦锁定目标指令，这些疾驰飞掠的太空死灵杀手便会持续向目标倾泻火力，即便是在敌阵上空盘旋俯冲、往复穿梭之际，攻势也未曾有丝毫停歇。

target.en: That <k>Necrons Mounted</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ネクロン・騎乗</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>太空死灵骑乘</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Necrons Mounted</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>berittene Necron</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Montada Necrones</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Nécrons Montée</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità <k>In Sella</k> dei <k>Necron</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ネクロン・騎乗</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>네크론 기승</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>太空死灵骑乘</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité et dont la F est supérieur à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした射撃攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 한 원거리 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对该己方单位进行的远程攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性时，攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: So rapidly and seemingly randomly does this skyborne unit jink through incoming fire that it is almost impossible for foes to land a solid direct hit.
fluff.de: So schnell und scheinbar nach dem Zufallsprinzip bewegen sich diese Flieger durch das eingehende Feuer, dass es für den Feind nahezu unmöglich ist, anständige Treffer zu verzeichnen.
fluff.es: Esta unidad aérea se abre paso entre el fuego enemigo con tanta rapidez y aparente aleatoriedad que es casi imposible para los enemigos asestarle un golpe directo y contundente.
fluff.fr: Cette unité aéroportée décrit des trajectoires si rapides et imprévisibles à travers les tirs ennemis qu’il est presque impossible de lui porter un coup direct.
fluff.it: Questa unità volante sfreccia tra il fuoco in arrivo in maniera talmente rapida e apparentemente casuale che per il nemico è quasi impossibile mettere a segno un colpo.
fluff.ja: この空中部隊は迫り来る砲火の中をあまりにも俊敏に、そして一見無作為に飛行するため、直撃弾を与えることは極めて困難だ。
fluff.ko: 공중에 뜬 이 네크론의 회피 기동은 너무나 빠른 데다 무작위로만 보이기 때문에 제대로 직격하기는 거의 불가능에 가깝다.
fluff.zh: 这个飞空单位闪躲攻击的方式过于迅速随机，要想命中他们几乎是不可能的。

target.en: That <k>Necrons Mounted</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ネクロン・騎乗</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>太空死灵骑乘</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Necrons Mounted unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete berittene Necron-­Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Montada Necrones amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité de Nécrons Montée amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità In Sella dei Necron non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるネクロン・騎乗・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 네크론 기승 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方太空死灵骑乘单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Reacting with android hyperresponsiveness, these skimmer Necrons fire thrusters and surge across the battlefield.
fluff.de: Diese Necronschweber reagieren mit den geschwinden Reflexen androider Maschinenkörper und rauschen mit lodernden Triebwerken über das Schlachtfeld.
fluff.es: Reaccionando con hiperreactividad de androide, estos Necrones voladores disparan propulsores y avanzan por el campo de batalla.
fluff.fr: En réagissant avec une hyper-réactivité androïde, ces glisseurs nécrons allument leurs réacteurs et filent à travers le champ de bataille.
fluff.it: Reagendo con riflessi ipersviluppati, questi Necron sfrecciano sul campo di battaglia con i reattori al massimo.
fluff.ja: 人工生命体としての超反応を示しながら、このスキマーを駆るネクロンたちは推進装置を噴射しながら戦場を無尽に駆け抜ける。
fluff.ko: 안드로이드 고유의 극단적인 초반응성을 갖춘 이 네크론 스키머는 추진기의 힘으로 전장에 쇄도한다.
fluff.zh: 这些太空死灵的飞行器以机械般的速度进行反应，迅速推进并穿越战场。

name.ja: 死の帷（オーラ）（アップグレード）

description.en: Obelisk unit only. In your opponent’s Battle‑shock step, if an enemy unit within 8" of this unit is below starting strength, that enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll.
description.de: Nur für eine Obelisk-Einheit. Im Schritt „Erschütterung“ deines Gegners muss eine feindliche Einheit, wenn sie sich innerhalb von 8" um diese Einheit befindet und unter Sollstärke ist, einen Erschütterungswurf ausführen.
description.es: Solo unidad Obelisco. En el paso de acobardamiento del oponente, toda unidad enemiga a 8" o menos de esta unidad que esté bajo efectivos iniciales debe hacer una tirada de acobardamiento.
description.fr: Unité d’Obélisque seulement. À l’étape d’Ébranlement adverse, si une unité ennemie à 8" ou moins de cette unité est en dessous de son effectif initial, elle fait un jet d’ébranlement.
description.it: Solo unità di Obelisco. Nel passo dei Traumi dell’avversario, se un’unità nemica entro 8" da questa unità è sotto la forza iniziale, quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi.
description.ja: オベリスク・ユニットのみ。敵軍側の戦闘ショックステップ中、このユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットの兵数が 初期配置未満である場合、その敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。
description.ko: 방첨탑 유닛 전용. 상대의 전투충격 단계에, 이 유닛의 8" 내에 있는 적 유닛이 시작 전력 미만이라면, 그 적 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다.
description.zh: 仅限方尖碑单位。在对手的战斗震慑步骤中，如果一个低于起始兵力的敌方单位位于该单位的 8" 内，那么那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰。

description.es: Solo unidad <k>Inmortales</k>. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen <k>[Fuego rápido 1]</k>.
description.fr: Unité d’<k>Immortels</k> seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont <k>[Tir Rapide 1]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Immortali</k>. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno <k>[Cadenza Rapida 1]</k>.
description.ja: <k>イモータル</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［ラピッドファイア1］</k>を持つ。
description.ko: <k>불멸대</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[속사 1]</k>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>不朽者</k>单位。该单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[速射 1]</k>技能。

description.en: Necron Warriors unit only. This unit has Scouts 5".
description.de: Nur für eine Necronkrieger-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat Kundschafter 5".
description.es: Solo unidad Guerreros Necrones. Esta unidad tiene Avanzadilla 5".
description.fr: Unité de Guerriers Nécrons seulement. Cette unité a Éclaireurs 5".
description.it: Solo unità di Necron Guerrieri. Questa unità ha Esploratori 5".
description.ja: ネクロン・ウォリアー・ユニットのみ。このユニットは『斥候5mv』を持つ。
description.ko: 네크론 전사 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 정찰 5"을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限太空死灵武士单位。该单位拥有斥候 5"技能。
